title: tagetes belenidium
intro: Tagetes belenidium, also known as the Mexican marigold or Wild Marigold, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of Central America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tagetes belenidium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Tagetes belenidium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal benefits, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
